nasb.text: But we cannot give them wives of our daughters.” For the sons of Israel had sworn, saying, “Cursed is he who gives a wife to Benjamin.”

esv.text: Yet we cannot give them wives from our daughters.” For the people of Israel had sworn, “Cursed be he who gives a wife to Benjamin.”

cnv.text: 但是我們不能把我們自己的女兒給他們作妻子。”因為以色列人曾經起誓說：“把女兒給便雅憫人作妻子的，是可咒詛的。”

ccb.text: 可是我们又不能把女儿嫁给他们，因为我们曾经起誓，‘把女儿嫁给便雅悯人的必受咒诅。’”
